title: Beet and Beet Tagine Stew
description: A hearty German-inspired stew made with beet and tagine, perfect for a chilly evening. This robust and flavorful dish is sure to become a new favorite.
instructions: Peel and chop the beet into large chunks.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the robust in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped beet and cook until it starts to soften.
Add the tagine, raw, and dutch to the pot. Stir to combine.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise for 45 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
